mapper.select:
select empno , kor_nm as empno_nm , dept_no , wu_cmm.codenm.dept(dept_no) as dept_no_nm , wu_cmm.codenm.comm(sclpst_cd) as sclpst_cd_nm , wu_cmm.codenm.comm(clsf_cd) as clsf_cd_nm , wu_cmm.codenm.comm(jbgp_cd) as jbgp_cd_nm , wu_cmm.codenm.comm(tcher_se_cd) as tcher_se_cd_nm , wu_cmm.codenm.comm(rspofc_cd) as rspofc_cd_nm , photo from ( select a.empno , a.kor_nm , a.dept_no , a.sclpst_cd , a.clsf_cd , a.jbgp_cd , a.tcher_se_cd , a.rspofc_cd , b.photo , row_number() over (order by a.dept_no, a.empno) as rn from emp_mstr a left join wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo b on a.empno = b.empno where 1=1 and a.sclpst_sttus_cd in ('3050100','3050200') and a.kor_nm is not null and a.dept_no is not null
AND a.empno LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND a.kor_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) where rn between #{startRow} AND #{endRow} order by dept_no, empno

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo_test a LEFT JOIN emp_mstr b ON a.empno = b.empno WHERE b.sclpst_sttus_cd IN ('3050100','3050200') AND b.kor_nm IS NOT NULL AND b.dept_no IS NOT NULL AND a.photo IS NOT NULL
AND a.empno LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.kor_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT a.empno , b.kor_nm AS empno_nm , b.dept_no , wu_cmm.codenm.dept(b.dept_no) AS dept_no_nm , a.photo FROM wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo_test a LEFT JOIN emp_mstr b ON a.empno = b.empno WHERE a.empno = #{empno}
